properties.name: Orphans of Uganda Children Center
properties.description: Orphans of 🇺🇬Uganda Children Center, is a none profit/religious organizations taking care of 77 orphaned children. The Orphans of Uganda Children Center cares for 77 vulnerable orphans, providing them with food, shelter, education, and emotional support. In a country with limited resources and few funding options, the center sustains itself through Bitcoin donations, which help cover essential expenses. This innovative use of cryptocurrency allows the center to receive direct support from donors worldwide, ensuring these children have a brighter future despite challenging circumstances.

We also partner with Bitcoin Tech companies like Btrust Fedimint and TBD to train our students on Bitcoin development and to build bitcoin based solutions for Bitcoiners

properties.name: Ola Bitcoin

Spread the ethos and ideology of Bitcoin not only in Botswana but across the SADC region as a means for individuals, businesses, and even nations to regain sovereignty and self-determination.

properties.name: MulaStack
properties.description: MulaStack is Kenya's first Bitcoin on-ramp and off-ramp solution, designed to make saving, investing and transacting in Bitcoin effortless across Africa. We address the growing demand for Bitcoin as a reliable way to diversify portfolios and preserve wealth. Our platform enables users to seamlessly convert KES into Bitcoin via Mpesa, making it easy to save, invest and withdraw Bitcoin using just a mobile phone. MulaStack bridges the gap between local currencies and Bitcoin, empowering Africans to participate in the global Bitcoin economy without barriers.

properties.name: West Data Group
properties.description: West Data Group (WDG) is a Hong Kong-based company under United International Engineering, specializing in the investment and construction of data centers. With a focus on sectors such as telecommunications, cryptocurrency mining, and AI training, WDG has developed strong partnerships with global leaders like HUAWEI, ZTE, and Canaan Inc., as well as key organizations in Ethiopia, including Ethio Telecom and Ethiopia Electric Power. In 2023, WDG expanded into Ethiopia, establishing Wes Data Center Service PLC and launching a significant 30MW data center project, positioning itself as a leader in data processing and digitalization efforts.

properties.description:
"Bitcoin Aves is a grassroots Bitcoin initiative based in Akatsi, Ghana. We focus on building a sustainable Circular Economy, teaching Bitcoin in a way that connects with local culture and needs. Our goal is to drive grassroots adoption through clear, accessible learning. At the heart of it all are values like decentralization, financial freedom, and sovereignty.
Rooted in the belief that true empowerment begins with understanding, Bitcoin Aves simplifies the complex, challenges the status quo, and champions economic independence, starting from Akatsi and rippling outward."
